description: Displays a binary probability tree with outcomes and probabilities. Shows a formula overlay at the top-left with n, P(success), P(failure), and |S| = 2^n. The formula font size follows the tree's fs() setting.

arguments.name: trial
arguments.description: Trial definition with labels and probability

arguments.name: fontSize
arguments.description: Font size for tree labels and formula overlay

examples.expression: B = btree(trial("H", "T", probability(1,2)), repeat(3), at(4,10), view(14,12))
B = btree(trial("S", "F", probability(2,5)), repeat(2), at(4,10), view(12,12))

B = btree(trial("H", "T", probability(1,2)), repeat(3), at(4,10), view(14,12))
S = sspace(B, at(4,24), view(10,10))
